mapper.select: SELECT i.item_code AS itemCode, i.item_name AS itemName FROM openplatform_lookup_item_t i JOIN openplatform_lookup_classify_t c ON c.classify_id = i.classify_id WHERE c.classify_code = #{classifyCode} AND c.status = 1 AND i.status = 1 ORDER BY i.item_index

SELECT i.item_value FROM openplatform_lookup_item_t i JOIN openplatform_lookup_classify_t c ON c.classify_id = i.classify_id WHERE c.classify_code = #{classifyCode} AND c.status = 1 AND i.status = 1 ORDER BY i.item_index

SELECT i.item_code AS item_code, i.item_value AS item_value FROM openplatform_lookup_item_t i JOIN openplatform_lookup_classify_t c ON c.classify_id = i.classify_id WHERE c.path = #{path} AND c.classify_code = #{classifyCode} AND c.status = 1 AND i.status = 1 ORDER BY i.item_index

SELECT i.item_value FROM openplatform_lookup_item_t i JOIN openplatform_lookup_classify_t c ON c.classify_id = i.classify_id WHERE c.classify_code = #{classifyCode} AND i.item_code = #{itemCode} AND c.status = 1 AND i.status = 1
